subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast dedicated thyself to the service of the Cause of God! Thy wondrous letter that was addressed to Jináb-i-Hájí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وقف نفسه علی خدمة امرالله رقیمه بدیعه که بجناب حاجی مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Shrines and Holy places, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution
